name: published_story_v3
description: An interactive adventure story completed and published by a player.

full_text.description: The accumulated narrative of the entire adventure.

final_score.description: The total score accumulated by the player.

author.description: The name or alias of the player who completed the adventure.

cause_of_death.description: The string outlining their survival or demise.

hero_image_url.description: URL of the DALL-E generated hero portrait.

finale_image_url.description: URL of the DALL-E generated finale mural.

scene_images.description: Array of URLs for all scene illustrations.

inventory.description: Array of strings representing the final inventory state.

achievements.description: Array of custom string achievements awarded for this run.

body.description: Required base core field by WordClaw.
